title: Lightweight Optimization
description: A lightweight and effective modpack that improves performance for lower end PC's that cant handle 500 optimization mods at once
body:
# Lightweight Optimization
Lightweight Optimization is a very small modpack with only **7** mods meant for better performance
## Mods
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) by [modmuss50](https://modrinth.com/user/modmuss50) and [sfPlayer1](https://modrinth.com/user/sfPlayer1)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by [coderbot](https://modrinth.com/user/coderbot) and [IMS](https://modrinth.com/user/IMS)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3) and [2No2Name](https://modrinth.com/user/2No2Name)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) by [The Terraformers Organization](https://modrinth.com/organization/terraformers), [Prospector](https://modrinth.com/user/Prospector) and [modmuss50](https://modrinth.com/user/modmuss50)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3) and [IMS](https://modrinth.com/user/IMS)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) by [FlashyReese](https://modrinth.com/user/FlashyReese)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) by [FlashyReese](https://modrinth.com/user/FlashyReese)
- Some of the versions also include [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api) by [Patbox](https://modrinth.com/user/Patbox)



My first upload on Modrinth! :D
